title: Khadi and Village Industries Commission Rules 2006 the Central Government hereby appoint Shri Rajendra Pratap Gupta as Expert Member
description: Khadi and Village Industries Commission Rules 2006 the Central Government hereby appoint Shri Rajendra Pratap Gupta as Expert Member

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2908] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] fnlEcj 9] 2016@vxzgk;.k 18] 1938 No. 2908] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, DECEMBER 9, 2016/AGRAHAYANA 18, 1938 सू᭯ म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒ म मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 9 ᳰदस᭥बर, 2016 का.आ. 3997(अ).—खादी और ᮕामो᳒ोग आयोग िनयम , 2006 के िनयम 3 और 4 के साथ पᳯठत खादी और ᮕामो᳒ोग आयोग अिधिनयम , 1956 (1956 का 61) कᳱ धारा 4 ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, के᭠ᮤ सरकार एत᳏ारा सरकारी राजपᮢ मᱶ इस अिधसूचना के ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख से खादी और ᮕामो᳒ोग आयोग के िवशेष᭄ सद᭭य (िवपणन) के ᱨप मᱶ ᮰ी राजे᭠ᮤ ᮧताप गु᳙ा को िनयुᲦ करती है और उस ᮧयो जनाथᭅ सू᭯म , लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म मंᮢालय , भारत सरकार कᳱ ᳰदनांक 26 अᲦूबर, 2015 कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎या का.आ. 2922(अ) मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत संशोधन करती है नामतः उᲦ अिधसूचना मᱶ ᮓम सं᭎या (1) के प᳟ात् गैर - सरकारी िवशेष᭄ सद᭭य से संबंिधत पैरा II मᱶ तथा उससे संबंिधत ᮧिवि᳥यᲂ मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत ᮓम सं᭎या तथा ᮧिवि᳥यां ᮧित᭭थािपत कᳱ जाएंगी , नामतः- ÔÔ(2) ᮰ी राजे᭠ᮤ ᮧताप गु᳙ा , 102, िसि᳍ िवनायक, ᭡लाट सं.3, अंश कािलकÕÕ से᭍टर 14, खंड कॉलोनी, नया पनवेल - पि᳟म , नवी मु᭥बई, महारा᳦ - 410206 2. ᮰ी राजे᭠ᮤ ᮧताप गु᳙ा 25 अᲦूबर, 2018 को समा᳙ अविध के िलए कायᭅभार संभालᱶगे। [फा. सं. ए-43013/6/2015-केवीआई-पी] बी. एच. अिनल कुमार, संयुᲦ सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th December, 2016 S.O. 3997(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 4 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 (61 of 1956), read with rules 3 and 4 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby appoint Shri Rajendra Pratap Gupta as Expert Member (Marketing) of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, number S.O. 2922(E), dated the 26th October, 2015 namely:- In the said notification, in paragraph II relating to Non-official Expert Member, after serial number (1) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:- “(2) Shri Rajendra Pratap Gupta, 102, Sidhhivinayak, Plot No. 3, Sector-14, Khanda Colony, New Panvel-W, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra-410206 Part Time” 2. Shri Rajendra Pratap Gupta shall hold office for a period ending on the 25th October, 2018. [F. No. A-43013/6/2015-KVI-P] B. H. ANIL KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
